titleStmt.title: SII 10.351: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 351. (A.R. No. 535 of 1925.) ON A PILLAR NEAR THE TEMPLE OF CHENNAKĒŚAVA AT KŌLAVENNU, BEZWADA TALUK, KRISHNA DISTRICT. Ś. 1177.

summary.p: States that general Pōtayaṁgāru and Āravelli Mārapōta Mañchiṁgāru presented a perpetual lamp each to the temple of Prasanna Kēśava of Kōlavennu and gave lands to certain persons on condition of their paying a certain number of Gōkana-rūkalu for the maintenance of the lamps.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakavarṣamulu
1177 nēṁḍu phālguṇa
śuddha daśami sōmavā
ramunāṁḍu śrīmatsēnā
dhipati yaina pōtayaṁgā
ru tama tallidaṁḍrulaku (laku)
dharmmuvugānu kōlavēṁṭi
prasannakēśavadēvaraku nakha
ṁḍadīpamu Ācaṁdratāra
kamugā niccitimi Īdī
pamunu brammanabōyuṁ
ḍu Ēṁṭanu gōru 24 Accu
vāṁḍu brammanabōyuniki
dēvabhōgamulōna cēnu na 2
Iccitimi . śrīmatukā
syapagōtru laina Ārivelli
mārapōtamaṁcciṁgāru
śrīmatkōlaveṁṭi prasanna
kēśavadēvarakunu Āca
ṁdratārakamugānu A
khaṁḍadīpamu veṭṭitimi
Īdīpamu [Anni]bōyuṁḍu
Ēṁṭā gōkanarū 24 Accu
vāṁḍu Annibōniki [ tennē
ṭicēlō ] na 2 cēnu Istmi re
ṁḍumōdāla niccitimi
Ēṁṭā paṁḍreṁḍugō
kanarūkalu Accuvāṁḍu
Annibōyuniki kraṁkipā
ṭi dalli tama Uṁḍelō
na tūmeṁḍu cēnu I
ccitimi .
Digital edition of SII 10.351 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
